---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for PlannerAPI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement

**What problem does this solve?**

Describe the problem or pain point this feature would address. For example:
- As a [CMO / Agency Owner / Brand Director], I need to...
- Currently, I have to [workaround], but I'd prefer to...

---

## ✨ Proposed Solution

**How should this feature work?**

Describe your ideal solution:
- What would the user experience look like?
- Where would this feature live in the app?
- What actions would the user take?
- What would the output/result be?

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

**Have you thought of alternative approaches?**

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why is your proposed solution better?

---

## 📊 Use Cases

**Who would benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] CMO / VP Marketing (mid-market)
- [ ] Agency Owner / Strategy Lead
- [ ] Brand / Performance Marketing Lead
- [ ] CX Leader
- [ ] All audience segments

**Example scenarios:**
1. [Scenario 1: Describe a specific use case]
2. [Scenario 2: Describe another use case]

---

## 🎨 Mockups / References

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other products.

---

## 🏗️ Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have technical suggestions for how this could be implemented, share them here. This is optional!

---

## 📈 Impact & Priority

**How important is this feature to you?**

- [ ] Critical - I can't use PlannerAPI effectively without it
- [ ] High - This would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have, but I can work around it
- [ ] Low - Just an idea for the future

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues or features here (e.g., #123)

---

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or considerations here.
